# Large Test File
# This file simulates a larger file for transfer testing

Line 1: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Line 2: Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs.
Line 3: How vexingly quick daft zebras jump!
Line 4: The five boxing wizards jump quickly.
Line 5: Jackdaws love my big sphinx of quartz.
Line 6: Mr. Jock, TV quiz PhD., bags few lynx.
Line 7: Waltz, bad nymph, for quick jigs vex.
Line 8: Glib jocks quiz nymph to vex dwarf.
Line 9: Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
Line 10: How quickly daft jumping zebras vex.

End of test file.
